monch
I think this was a Father Brown Episode, only it wasn't Santa.
Guy on the right is into it.

item.title: Meme beats everything!
item.description:
Venom, the ultimate ally
This person deserves a Nobel prize
I may or may not have acquired a lot of images about one particular topic.
bless them all
Not to disparage the chief but. Where's Rom.
Yeah, I have a lot of these.
Yeah...
Me also
Avery's pah is strong.
My 3 brain cells.
No notes
But are they cute and cuddly, boys? Cute and cuddly?
King David and Alexander the Great were gay (not for each other... probably). There was a trans Roman emperor. People are people and for some reason weirdos have a problem with this.
Derek did nothing wrong... I assume
A lot of these were stolen from @CodyBurkett
Flesh and Blood TCG tax.

item.title: If one of these pigs doesn't win an Academy award... Thank you Mississippi for consistently making Arkansas look good!
item.description:
I made a slo-mo version below, so I could see everything going on. And... added the perfect song. "Angus the Prize-Winning Hog" by the Toxhards. ^•(∞)•^ ) v v v~~ Sauce: Not my video, but here's the Mississippi mud... https://www.instagram.com/reel/DBNZqIlAjfp/?igsh=MXZ0dThmMjRqNWc2bA==
Mom's chocolate chip cookie tax
